reasoning: Multiple authoritative reports from October 2025 (including NBC San Diego, The Guardian, and The Athletic/NYT) confirm that San Diego FC not only qualified for the 2025 MLS Cup Playoffs in their inaugural season but did so as the #1 seed in the Western Conference. They reportedly clinched their playoff berth as early as August 24, 2025, and finished the regular season with a record-setting 19 wins and 63 points. As of the knowledge cutoff (October 26, 2025), they have already begun their playoff campaign, having played (or being scheduled to play) Game 1 of the Round One Best-of-3 series. This outcome is effectively certain based on the available information.
